title: EVERNIGHT x EVANESCIA
description:
A special birthday AMV collaboration project (KID X RESH6DE) split into two parts: // EVERNIGHT and // EVANESCIA. This edit focuses on a dark purple aesthetic, heavy kinetic typography, smooth masking, and dynamic glow effects.

Tools used: Adobe After Effects (Sapphire & Boris FX plugins)
Audio: Britney Spears - ...Baby One More Time (Epic/Slowed Remix)

title: Thumnail
description: Thumnail yang akan ku pakai di tiap vidio

title: Beatrix "Kiss Me" Gameplay Edit
description:
MLBB Beatrix fast-paced edit. Features tight beat-syncing, dynamic transitions, and text overlays synced to the music.
Tools: After effect 2021

title: Hiyuki Neon Edit PMV - No Horny
description:
A short aesthetic PMV featuring Hiyuki, focusing on neon glow overlays, smooth masking, and beat-sync transitions. Includes a little surprise meme at the end.

SW:Aftter effect
